message:
feat(search): add IPC/robot mode search API types (ft-dr6zv.1.6)

Add typed response structures for robot mode search API:
- SearchScoringBreakdown: per-result BM25/semantic/RRF/reranker scores
- ExplainedSearchHit: extended hit with scoring breakdown
- SearchExplainData: response for ft robot search --explain
- SearchPipelineTiming: phase-level timing breakdown
- SearchStreamPhase: JSONL streaming phase markers (fast/quality/done)
- SearchPipelineStatusData: pipeline operational state + watermarks
- SearchPipelineControlResult: pause/resume/rebuild responses

Add From conversions from pipeline types to robot types.
12 new unit tests, all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
